news.title: Class of 2026 ready to make an impact
news.summary_en: From future elementary educators and school counselors to educational leaders and mental health professionals, this graduating class reflects both the growing needs of today’s schools and the expanding ways educators make an impact. Among the undergraduate class alone are 17 first-generation students.

news.title: Geoengineering summit helps students be part of the solution for climate change
news.summary_en: Around 200 local middle and high school students presented their solutions to climate change during the second annual Geoengineering Summit. Prep for the summit started months earlier, when teachers were given a five-lesson unit and attended the Geoengineering workshop in December.
